---
title: How-to template
description: A task-oriented layout for solving a specific problem with clear, scannable steps.
---

Use this layout when the reader already knows the basics and needs to accomplish one distinct objective.

## The goal

Help a user who already knows the basics solve a specific, real-world problem or achieve a distinct objective.

## The tone

Practical, direct, and action-driven. Headings should focus on the action and the benefit to make them easily scannable.

## Recommended layout

### The goal or scenario

This guide shows you how to [achieve X task] in order to [get Y benefit].

### Implementation steps

A series of numbered steps focused entirely on action. Keep conceptual fluff out of this section.

### Verification

A quick way for the reader to test and confirm that the guide worked — for example, "Run this command, and you should see this output."
